_comment: Ship data with editorial content. Keys match DataForge entity filenames. Crew, cargo, prices, speed, role, description are all override data.

rsi_aurora_gs_mr.name: Aurora MR
rsi_aurora_gs_mr.description: RSI's entry-level ship. Versatile starter with basic cargo and combat capability.

rsi_aurora_gs_ln.name: Aurora LN
rsi_aurora_gs_ln.description: Combat-oriented Aurora with extra weapons. The fighter of the Aurora line.

rsi_aurora_gs_es.name: Aurora ES
rsi_aurora_gs_es.description: Budget exploration variant of the Aurora. Extended fuel range.

rsi_aurora_gs_lx.name: Aurora LX
rsi_aurora_gs_lx.description: Luxury variant of the Aurora with upgraded interior and components.

rsi_aurora_gs_cl.name: Aurora CL
rsi_aurora_gs_cl.description: Commerce variant of the Aurora. Designed for hauling and trade runs.

cnou_mustang_alpha.name: Mustang Alpha
cnou_mustang_alpha.description: Fast and agile starter ship from Consolidated Outland.

cnou_mustang_beta.name: Mustang Beta
cnou_mustang_beta.description: Exploration variant with a small living space. Good for solo pathfinding.

cnou_mustang_gamma.name: Mustang Gamma
cnou_mustang_gamma.description: Racing variant of the Mustang with enhanced engines.

cnou_mustang_delta.name: Mustang Delta
cnou_mustang_delta.description: Combat Mustang with rocket pods and upgraded weapons.

cnou_nomad.name: Nomad
cnou_nomad.description: All-in-one starter with living quarters and an external cargo bed.

aegs_avenger_titan.name: Avenger Titan
aegs_avenger_titan.description: Best-in-class starter upgrade. Great mix of cargo, combat, and speed.

aegs_avenger_stalker.name: Avenger Stalker
aegs_avenger_stalker.description: Bounty hunting variant with prisoner pods instead of cargo.

aegs_avenger_warlock.name: Avenger Warlock
aegs_avenger_warlock.description: Electronic warfare Avenger with a powerful EMP generator.

orig_100i.name: 100i
orig_100i.description: Origin's luxury starter. Clean design with a small living space.

orig_125a.name: 125a
orig_125a.description: Combat variant of the 100 series with upgraded weapons.

orig_135c.name: 135c
orig_135c.description: Cargo variant of the 100 series with expanded hold.

orig_300i.name: 300i
orig_300i.description: Origin's luxury touring ship with solid combat performance.

orig_315p.name: 315p
orig_315p.description: Exploration variant with a tractor beam and extended fuel range.

orig_325a.name: 325a
orig_325a.description: Combat variant of the 300 series with upgraded weapons and a missile bay.

orig_350r.name: 350r
orig_350r.description: The fastest of the 300 series. Built for racing and pursuit.

orig_85x.name: 85X
orig_85x.description: Luxury two-seater snub craft. Originally designed for the 890 Jump.

orig_m50.name: M50
orig_m50.description: Origin's premier racing ship. Extremely fast and nimble.

anvl_arrow.name: Arrow
anvl_arrow.description: Nimble light fighter with excellent maneuverability. Pure combat ship.

anvl_c8_pisces.name: C8 Pisces
anvl_c8_pisces.description: Compact shuttle designed for the Carrack. Good starter alternative.

anvl_c8x_pisces_expedition.name: C8X Pisces Expedition
anvl_c8x_pisces_expedition.description: Upgraded Pisces with better weapons. The standalone version.

anvl_hawk.name: Hawk
anvl_hawk.description: Bounty hunter's light fighter with EMP and prisoner pod.

anvl_gladiator.name: Gladiator
anvl_gladiator.description: Two-seat torpedo bomber. Deadly anti-capital punch in a small frame.

aegs_gladius.name: Gladius
aegs_gladius.description: The UEE Navy's primary light fighter. Proven and reliable.

aegs_gladius_valiant.name: Gladius Valiant
aegs_gladius_valiant.description: Special edition Gladius with unique livery and upgraded components.

aegs_sabre.name: Sabre
aegs_sabre.description: Stealth-focused medium fighter with four weapon hardpoints.

aegs_sabre_firebird.name: Sabre Firebird
aegs_sabre_firebird.description: Variant Sabre with different default loadout and unique paint.

aegs_sabre_raven.name: Sabre Raven
aegs_sabre_raven.description: Intel-exclusive EMP variant. Trades firepower for electronic warfare.

aegs_eclipse.name: Eclipse
aegs_eclipse.description: Stealth torpedo bomber. Delivers devastating first strikes from the shadows.

drak_buccaneer.name: Buccaneer
drak_buccaneer.description: Drake's dedicated fighter. Glass cannon with heavy firepower for its size.

drak_herald.name: Herald
drak_herald.description: Extremely fast data runner. Gets in, grabs data, gets out.

drak_cutter.name: Cutter
drak_cutter.description: Drake's budget starter. Simple, cheap, and functional.

drak_cutter_rambler.name: Cutter Rambler
drak_cutter_rambler.description: Exploration variant of the Cutter with tractor beam and scanning.

drak_cutter_scout.name: Cutter Scout
drak_cutter_scout.description: Scouting variant with enhanced sensors and scanning equipment.

banu_defender.name: Defender
banu_defender.description: Banu medium fighter designed to escort Merchantman convoys.

espr_talon.name: Talon
espr_talon.description: Human-built recreation of the Tevarin Talon. Agile ambush fighter.

espr_talon_shrike.name: Talon Shrike
espr_talon_shrike.description: Missile-focused Talon variant. Trades guns for a heavier missile load.

krig_p52_merlin.name: P-52 Merlin
krig_p52_merlin.description: Snub fighter designed for the Constellation. No quantum drive.

krig_p72_archimedes.name: P-72 Archimedes
krig_p72_archimedes.description: Racing snub craft from Kruger. The 890 Jump's personal runabout.

misc_reliant.name: Reliant Kore
misc_reliant.description: Two-seat starter with Xi'an-influenced rotating wing design.

misc_reliant_tana.name: Reliant Tana
misc_reliant_tana.description: Fighter variant of the Reliant with missiles and upgraded weapons.

misc_reliant_sen.name: Reliant Sen
misc_reliant_sen.description: Science variant with research equipment and telescope.

misc_reliant_mako.name: Reliant Mako
misc_reliant_mako.description: News van variant designed for recording and broadcasting.

misc_razor.name: Razor
misc_razor.description: MISC's dedicated racing ship. Blade-thin and extremely fast.

misc_fury.name: Fury
misc_fury.description: MISC's snub fighter. Compact and punchy for its size.

misc_hull_a.name: Hull A
misc_hull_a.description: Entry-level dedicated hauler. External cargo spindle for maximum SCU per credit.

misc_prospector.name: Prospector
misc_prospector.description: Solo mining ship. The entry point into ship-based mining operations.

drak_golem.name: Golem
drak_golem.description: Drake's entry-level mining ship with saddlebag ore storage.

drak_vulture.name: Vulture
drak_vulture.description: Solo salvage ship. Scrapes hulls for RMC and recoverable materials.

misc_fortune.name: Fortune
misc_fortune.description: MISC's entry-level salvage ship. Competitor to the Drake Vulture.

gama_syulen.name: Syulen
gama_syulen.description: Gatac's elegant starter. Xi'an-influenced design with exploration focus.

crus_intrepid.name: Intrepid
crus_intrepid.description: Crusader's entry into the starter market. Stylish and practical.

anvl_terrapin.name: Terrapin
anvl_terrapin.description: Heavily armored scanning ship. Built to survive hostile space while gathering intel.

rsi_mantis.name: Mantis
rsi_mantis.description: Quantum enforcement vessel. Pulls ships out of quantum travel.

krig_l21_wolf.name: Wolf
krig_l21_wolf.description: Kruger's first standalone fighter. Fast and agile with solid firepower.

krig_l22_alphawolf.name: Alpha Wolf
krig_l22_alphawolf.description: Enhanced Wolf variant with upgraded components and loadout.

glsn_shiv.name: Shiv
glsn_shiv.description: Heavy fighter from Consolidated Outland. Packs serious firepower.

mrai_pulse.name: Pulse
mrai_pulse.description: Mirai's agile light fighter with energy-focused weapons.

mrai_pulse_lx.name: Pulse LX
mrai_pulse_lx.description: Racing variant of the Pulse with enhanced speed.

xian_nox.name: Nox
xian_nox.description: Xi'an hover bike. Sleek, fast, and agile on the ground and in space.

drak_dragonfly.name: Dragonfly
drak_dragonfly.description: Drake's two-seat hover bike. Fits in most ship cargo bays.

orig_x1.name: X1
orig_x1.description: Origin's luxury hover bike. Style meets speed.

xian_scout.name: Khartu-al
xian_scout.description: Xi'an scout ship with unique folding wing design. Very maneuverable.

vncl_blade.name: Blade
vncl_blade.description: Human reproduction of the Vanduul Blade fighter.

vncl_glaive.name: Glaive
vncl_glaive.description: Human reproduction of the Vanduul Glaive. Dual-blade heavy fighter.

vncl_scythe.name: Scythe
vncl_scythe.description: Captured Vanduul fighter. Extremely rare and iconic.

aegs_vanguard.name: Vanguard Warden
aegs_vanguard.description: Long-range heavy fighter with thick armor and a nose cannon.

aegs_vanguard_harbinger.name: Vanguard Harbinger
aegs_vanguard_harbinger.description: Torpedo-equipped Vanguard. Heavy fighter with anti-capital capability.

aegs_vanguard_sentinel.name: Vanguard Sentinel
aegs_vanguard_sentinel.description: Electronic warfare Vanguard with EMP and e-war suite.

aegs_vanguard_hoplite.name: Vanguard Hoplite
aegs_vanguard_hoplite.description: Troop transport Vanguard. Carries soldiers into combat zones.

drak_cutlass_black.name: Cutlass Black
drak_cutlass_black.description: Drake's workhorse. Great cargo, a manned turret, and vehicle transport.

drak_cutlass_blue.name: Cutlass Blue
drak_cutlass_blue.description: Law enforcement Cutlass with prisoner pods and quantum dampener.

drak_cutlass_red.name: Cutlass Red
drak_cutlass_red.description: Medical Cutlass with med beds. Ambulance of the verse.

drak_cutlass_steel.name: Cutlass Steel
drak_cutlass_steel.description: Troop transport Cutlass with jump seats and door guns.

misc_freelancer.name: Freelancer
misc_freelancer.description: MISC's reliable hauler with turret options and solid cargo capacity.

misc_freelancer_max.name: Freelancer MAX
misc_freelancer_max.description: Expanded cargo Freelancer. More SCU at the cost of some agility.

misc_freelancer_dur.name: Freelancer DUR
misc_freelancer_dur.description: Exploration variant with extended fuel tanks and better scanners.

misc_freelancer_mis.name: Freelancer MIS
misc_freelancer_mis.description: Missile-heavy Freelancer. Massive missile payload for its size class.

anvl_hornet_f7c.name: Hornet F7C
anvl_hornet_f7c.description: The civilian Hornet. Anvil's iconic medium fighter.

anvl_hornet_f7c_mk2.name: Hornet F7C Mk II
anvl_hornet_f7c_mk2.description: Updated Hornet with modernized frame and improved hardpoints.

anvl_hornet_f7cm.name: Super Hornet F7C-M
anvl_hornet_f7cm.description: Two-seat Super Hornet. More weapons and a co-pilot seat.

anvl_hornet_f7cm_mk2.name: Super Hornet Mk II
anvl_hornet_f7cm_mk2.description: Updated two-seat Super Hornet with modernized systems.

anvl_hornet_f7cs.name: Hornet Ghost F7C-S
anvl_hornet_f7cs.description: Stealth Hornet with reduced signature and covert ops loadout.

anvl_hornet_f7cs_mk2.name: Hornet Ghost Mk II
anvl_hornet_f7cs_mk2.description: Updated Ghost with improved stealth and modernized frame.

anvl_hornet_f7cr.name: Hornet Tracker F7C-R
anvl_hornet_f7cr.description: Tracker Hornet with enhanced radar and scanning suite.

anvl_hornet_f7cr_mk2.name: Hornet Tracker Mk II
anvl_hornet_f7cr_mk2.description: Updated Tracker with improved scanning and modernized frame.

anvl_hurricane.name: Hurricane
anvl_hurricane.description: Two-seat heavy fighter. Devastating turret firepower for its size.

anvl_lightning_f8c.name: F8C Lightning
anvl_lightning_f8c.description: Civilian variant of the UEE Navy's premier heavy fighter.

anvl_paladin.name: Paladin
anvl_paladin.description: Anvil's multi-crew gunship. Heavy armor and turrets.

crus_spirit_a1.name: Spirit A1
crus_spirit_a1.description: Crusader's strike variant. Bomb bay replaces cargo for ground attack.

crus_spirit_c1.name: Spirit C1
crus_spirit_c1.description: Crusader's medium hauler. Sleek design with good cargo capacity.

crus_star_runner.name: Mercury Star Runner
crus_star_runner.description: Fast data runner with hidden compartments and solid cargo space.

crus_starfighter_inferno.name: Ares Inferno
crus_starfighter_inferno.description: Ballistic anti-capital fighter with a massive S7 gatling cannon.

crus_starfighter_ion.name: Ares Ion
crus_starfighter_ion.description: Energy anti-capital fighter with a massive S7 laser cannon.

rsi_scorpius.name: Scorpius
rsi_scorpius.description: Two-seat heavy fighter with remote turret. X-wing inspired design.

rsi_scorpius_antares.name: Scorpius Antares
rsi_scorpius_antares.description: Upgraded Scorpius variant with enhanced weapons and systems.

rsi_meteor.name: Meteor
rsi_meteor.description: RSI's modern medium fighter. Versatile and well-armed.

mrai_guardian.name: Guardian
mrai_guardian.description: Mirai's heavy fighter. Fast and well-armed for its class.

mrai_guardian_mx.name: Guardian MX
mrai_guardian_mx.description: Military spec Guardian with upgraded weapons and armor.

mrai_guardian_qi.name: Guardian QI
mrai_guardian_qi.description: Electronic warfare Guardian with interdiction capabilities.

aegs_redeemer.name: Redeemer
aegs_redeemer.description: Heavy gunship with twin manned turrets. A flying fortress.

aegs_retaliator.name: Retaliator
aegs_retaliator.description: Multi-crew torpedo bomber. Modular bays for torpedoes or cargo.

argo_mole.name: MOLE
argo_mole.description: Multi-crew mining platform with three operator seats and large ore capacity.

argo_raft.name: RAFT
argo_raft.description: Dedicated container hauler. Docks standard cargo containers.

argo_mpuv.name: MPUV Cargo
argo_mpuv.description: Tiny utility ship. Moves cargo between ships and stations.

argo_mpuv_1t.name: MPUV-1T
argo_mpuv_1t.description: Personnel transport variant. Moves people instead of cargo.

argo_srv.name: SRV
argo_srv.description: Ship recovery vehicle with tractor beam for towing disabled vessels.

espr_prowler.name: Prowler
espr_prowler.description: Tevarin-inspired stealth dropship. Delivers troops through shield technology.

drak_corsair.name: Corsair
drak_corsair.description: Drake's explorer. Heavy guns, habitation, and the Drake aesthetic.

drak_clipper.name: Clipper
drak_clipper.description: Drake's generalist medium ship. Jack of all trades.

anvl_carrack.name: Carrack
anvl_carrack.description: Anvil's premier explorer. Med bay, hangar, drone bay, and a Pisces snub.

anvl_valkyrie.name: Valkyrie
anvl_valkyrie.description: Military dropship. Carries vehicles and troops with door guns.

rsi_constellation_andromeda.name: Constellation Andromeda
rsi_constellation_andromeda.description: RSI's flagship multi-crew ship. Snub fighter, turrets, missiles, and cargo.

rsi_constellation_taurus.name: Constellation Taurus
rsi_constellation_taurus.description: Cargo-focused Constellation. Maximum hauling in the Connie frame.

rsi_constellation_aquila.name: Constellation Aquila
rsi_constellation_aquila.description: Exploration Constellation with rover bay and upgraded scanners.

rsi_constellation_phoenix.name: Constellation Phoenix
rsi_constellation_phoenix.description: VIP luxury Constellation. Hot tub, bar, and a point defense turret.

orig_400i.name: 400i
orig_400i.description: Origin's luxury pathfinder. Fast, shielded, and beautiful.

orig_600i.name: 600i Explorer
orig_600i.description: Origin's large luxury explorer. Vehicle bay and generous living space.

orig_600i_touring.name: 600i Touring
orig_600i_touring.description: Touring variant with enhanced luxury interior and amenities.

orig_890jump.name: 890 Jump
orig_890jump.description: Origin's flagship yacht. The most luxurious ship in the verse.

drak_caterpillar.name: Caterpillar
drak_caterpillar.description: Drake's modular heavy hauler. Massive cargo capacity with command module.

crus_starlifter_c2.name: C2 Hercules
crus_starlifter_c2.description: Crusader's military-grade heavy transport. Vehicles and cargo in one package.

crus_starlifter_m2.name: M2 Hercules
crus_starlifter_m2.description: Military Hercules with heavier armor, shields, and turrets.

crus_starlifter_a2.name: A2 Hercules
crus_starlifter_a2.description: Bomber Hercules with MOAB and turrets. The biggest boom in the verse.

misc_hull_c.name: Hull C
misc_hull_c.description: Massive external spindle hauler. The backbone of UEE commerce.

misc_starfarer.name: Starfarer
misc_starfarer.description: MISC's tanker. Refuels other ships and hauls liquid cargo.

misc_starfarer_gemini.name: Starfarer Gemini
misc_starfarer_gemini.description: Militarized Starfarer with heavier armor and defensive turrets.

misc_starlancer_max.name: Starlancer MAX
misc_starlancer_max.description: MISC's new heavy hauler. Replacement for aging Freelancer platform.

misc_starlancer_tac.description: Military variant of the Starlancer. Heavy weapons and troop capacity.

rsi_apollo_medivac.name: Apollo Medivac
rsi_apollo_medivac.description: Dedicated medical ship with Tier 1 med beds. The best healing in flight.

rsi_apollo_triage.description: Medical ship with Tier 2 med beds. More beds at lower healing tier.

rsi_hermes.name: Zeus MkII CL
rsi_hermes.description: RSI's modernized medium hauler. Clean design with good cargo space.

rsi_zeus_cl.name: Zeus CL
rsi_zeus_cl.description: RSI's medium cargo variant Zeus. Dedicated hauling platform.

rsi_zeus_es.name: Zeus ES
rsi_zeus_es.description: Exploration variant of the Zeus with scanning and extended range.

xnaa_santokyai.name: San'tok.yai
xnaa_santokyai.description: Xi'an medium fighter. Unique alien design with powerful weapons.

vncl_stinger.description: Human reproduction of the Vanduul Stinger heavy fighter.

rsi_salvation.name: Galaxy
rsi_salvation.description: RSI's modular platform. Swap modules for cargo, medical, refinery, or more.

aegs_hammerhead.name: Hammerhead
aegs_hammerhead.description: Six manned turrets on a heavily armored platform. The ultimate anti-fighter ship.

aegs_reclaimer.description: Industrial-scale salvage platform. Massive capacity for large wreck operations.

rsi_perseus.name: Perseus
rsi_perseus.description: Heavy gunship with dual S7 turrets. Built to take on capitals.

rsi_polaris.name: Polaris
rsi_polaris.description: RSI's corvette with torpedo bays and a hangar for a medium fighter.

anvl_asgard.description: Anvil's capital-class assault ship. A true warship.

anvl_terrapin_medic.description: Medical variant of the Terrapin with a med bed.

espr_prowler_utility.description: Cargo variant of the Prowler. Trades troop capacity for freight.

mrai_pulse_collector_civ.description: Collector Edition Pulse. A Wikelo reward variant of the light fighter.

rsi_meteor_collector_military.description: Collector Edition Meteor. A Wikelo reward variant of the medium fighter.
